recommendations.title: Sharknado 5: Global Swarming
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Fin and his wife April travel around the world to save their young son who's trapped inside a sharknado.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No!
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: The sharks take bite out of the East Coast when the sharknado hits Washington, D.C. and Orlando, Florida.

recommendations.title: The Last Sharknado: It's About Time
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Our hero Fin has battled sharks all over the globe, but in this last installment he will tackle the final shark-tier - time travel.

recommendations.title: Hansel & Gretel
recommendations.overview: In this modern retelling of the classic horror tale, teen siblings are enslaved by a psychotic recluse within her gruesome house of horrors in the woods.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 4: The 4th Awakens
recommendations.overview: The new installment of the Sharknado franchise takes place 5 years after Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No! There have been no Sharknados in the intervening years, but now they’re appearing again in unexpected ways.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
recommendations.overview: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

recommendations.title: Sharknado
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A freak hurricane hits Los Angeles, causing man-eating sharks to be scooped up in tornadoes and flooding the city with shark-infested seawater. Surfer and bar-owner Fin sets out with his friends Baz and Nova to rescue his estranged wife April and tee

recommendations.title: Halloween
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween Night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield, Illinois to kill again.

recommendations.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and desperate for work, a troubled young man named Mike agrees to take a position as a night security guard at an abandoned theme restaurant: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. But he soon discovers that nothing at Freddy's is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Vampyr
recommendations.overview: Allan Gray, a young man fascinated by the supernatural, goes to a small village where he feels a sinister force descending upon him. There, Allan meets an old man who asks him to protect his two daughters, for one of them has been bitten by a vampire
